message:
feat(conformance,phase2c): add metamorphic, adversarial, and e2e forensics validation for FT-P2C-004

Expand the FT-P2C-004 autograd scheduler differential conformance harness
with metamorphic scale-relation checks, adversarial reentrant-overflow
probes, and a full end-to-end replay forensics pipeline. This brings the
packet from basic abs_tol + policy differential checks to a comprehensive
validation surface covering six comparators across strict and hardened
execution modes.

## Conformance harness changes (crates/ft-conformance/src/lib.rs)

- Add `scaled_scheduler_case()` helper that constructs a 2x-scaled variant
  of each scheduler fixture case for metamorphic testing.
- Add `scheduler_scale_relation_holds()` which validates that scaling inputs
  by factor k produces outputs scaled by k^2 and gradients scaled by k,
  within the configured tolerance.
- Emit `metamorphic_scale_relation_local` checks (local tape vs scaled tape)
  and `metamorphic_scale_relation_oracle` checks (legacy oracle vs scaled
  oracle) for every autograd scheduler case in both modes.
- Add `strict_overflow_rejected()` probe that constructs a tape with
  current_reentrant_depth > max_reentrant_depth under StrictFail policy
  and asserts that `ReentrantDepthExceeded` is returned.
- Add `hardened_overflow_guarded()` probe that does the same under
  HardenedBoundedFallback policy and asserts that the backward pass
  succeeds with `reentrant_guard_triggered` and `hardened_fallback_used`
  both true.
- Emit `adversarial_strict_reentrant_overflow_rejected` checks in strict
  mode and `adversarial_hardened_reentrant_overflow_guarded` checks in
  hardened mode for every scheduler case.
- Hoist tolerance and evidence_refs computation out of the per-case oracle
  match to reduce redundant allocations.
- Change `query_legacy_scheduler_oracle` return handling to use
  `oracle.as_ref()` so the oracle result can be reused for both base
  and metamorphic comparisons.
- Expand `autograd_scheduler_evidence_refs()` to include the new
  differential packet report and reconciliation note paths.
- Add `e2e_matrix_packet_filter_includes_autograd_scheduler_packet_entries`
  test verifying that the e2e matrix emitter with packet_id="FT-P2C-004"
  produces exactly 6 entries (3 strict + 3 hardened), all tagged with the
  correct packet and suite.
- Add `differential_autograd_scheduler_adds_metamorphic_and_adversarial_checks`
  test asserting the presence of the four new comparator families in the
  differential report output.

## Differential report expansion (differential_report_v1.json)

- Total checks increase from 146 to 180 (34 new checks across the new
  comparator families for 3 cases x 2 modes x ~6 comparators each).
- Allowlisted drifts increase from 2 to 4 (the hardened policy
  `autograd.reentrant_depth_bounded_fallback` drift now appears for
  scheduler_chain in addition to composite_scheduler_dac and
  dependency_underflow_probe).
- All evidence_refs arrays enriched with unit_property_quality_report,
  differential_packet_report, and differential_reconciliation references.

## New FT-P2C-004 packet artifacts

- `differential_packet_report_v1.json`: Packet-scoped slice of the
  differential report containing 42 checks (39 pass, 3 allowlisted drift,
  0 blocking) with suite/mode/status/comparator breakdowns.
- `differential_reconciliation_v1.md`: Human-readable reconciliation note
  documenting the 3 allowlisted hardened policy drifts, metamorphic +
  adversarial coverage, and risk-note threat control linkage.
- `unit_property_quality_report_v1.json`: Quality report with coverage
  floors (line=95.7%, region=95.8%) and 5 property-based invariant
  families including scheduler replay stability, shared parent dependency,
  strict/hardened reentrant overflow, and telemetry self-consistency.
- `unit_property_coverage_v1.json`: Raw llvm-cov JSON export for the
  ft-autograd crate (95.7% line, 95.8% region coverage).
- `e2e_replay_forensics_linkage_v1.json`: Structured linkage summary
  connecting the 6 e2e log entries to unit/property, differential, and
  risk evidence with deterministic replay field coverage attestation.
- `e2e_replay_forensics_linkage_v1.md`: Human-readable linkage note
  documenting outcomes, replay contract status, and cross-evidence refs.

## New e2e forensics artifacts

- `ft-p2c-004.jsonl`: 6-entry e2e forensics log (3 strict, 3 hardened)
  filtered to packet FT-P2C-004 with all entries passing
  (reason_code=scheduler_parity_ok).
- `crash_triage_ft_p2c_004_v1.json`: Crash triage with 0 incidents.
- `failure_forensics_index_ft_p2c_004_v1.json`: Failure forensics index
  with suite evidence templates linking unit/property, differential,
  e2e, and performance references.

## Manifest and gate updates

- `fixture_manifest.json`: Add top-level keys for all new artifacts
  (differential_packet_report, differential_reconciliation_note,
  e2e_log_artifact, e2e_crash_triage_artifact, e2e_failure_forensics_index,
  e2e_linkage_summary, e2e_linkage_note). Add `differential_validation`
  block with bead_id, required comparators, regression test commands, and
  e2e scenario hooks. Add `e2e_validation` block with scenario IDs, mode
  breakdown, and 0-failure attestation. Extend `contract_artifacts` list.
- `parity_gate.yaml`: Add differential and e2e matrix check commands
  (routed via rch exec). Update existing commands from bare cargo to
  `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=...` form. Add all new artifacts to
  the gate artifact list.
- `parity_report.json`: Bump cases_total and cases_passed from 1 to 3 in
  both strict and hardened (reflecting scheduler_chain and
  dependency_underflow_probe alongside composite_scheduler_dac). Update
  generated_from command to the differential test invocation.
- `risk_note.md`: Insert differential packet slice and reconciliation note
  into the required artifact linkage chain (items 5-6), shifting contract
  anchor to item 7.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+- `adversarial_strict_reentrant_overflow_rejected`

+
+## Risk-Note Linkage
+
+Validated threat controls mapped in `artifacts/phase2c/FT-P2C-004/risk_note.md`:
+- `THR-401`: dependency underflow corruption fails closed
+- `THR-402`: scheduler ordering determinism
+- `THR-403`: reentrant overflow mode-split enforcement
+- `THR-404`: hardened allowlist drift containment
+- `THR-405`: replay evidence continuity through differential checks
+
+Deferred scope remains explicit:
+- `autograd_scheduler:multithread_queue_interleave_gap`
+
+## Method-Stack Status for This Bead
+
+- alien-artifact-coding: packet differential slice emitted with deterministic mode-split drift classification and scenario linkage.
+- extreme-software-optimization: no optimization lever changed; scheduler behavior-isomorphism preserved for all non-allowlisted comparators.
+- security/compatibility doctrine: strict mode remains fail-closed; hardened mode drift is bounded to allowlisted `autograd.reentrant_depth_bounded_fallback`.
+- RaptorQ-everywhere durability: durability sidecar updates are deferred to final packet evidence bead (`bd-3v0.15.9`).
